description: Perform a sentiment analysis on the 'Women's E-Commerce Clothing Reviews' dataset (/home/ga/RProjects/datasets/clothing_reviews.csv) using the tidytext package and the AFINN lexicon (/home/ga/RProjects/datasets/afinn_lexicon.csv). Save a CSV named 'class_sentiment_summary.csv' to /home/ga/RProjects/output/ containing the average sentiment score and review count for each 'Class Name' with at least 50 reviews. Create a histogram or density plot of the sentiment score distribution for the 'Dresses' class and save it as 'dresses_sentiment_dist.png' to /home/ga/RProjects/output/. Export 'dresses_negative_words.csv' to /home/ga/RProjects/output/, listing the top 20 most frequent words contributing to negative sentiment (score < 0) within the 'Dresses' class, sorted by frequency.
